title: GR Full Singularity: Penrose-Hawking, Trapped Surfaces & Cauchy Horizon

key_theorem.statement: In GR, trapped surfaces are EML-2 (locally computable: θ < 0 from metric derivatives). Event horizons are EML-∞ (teleological). The Penrose singularity blowup time λ* = 2/|θ₀| is EML-2; the singularity itself (λ → λ*) is EML-∞. BKL chaotic oscillations near spacelike singularities are EML-∞ (Gauss/continued fraction map = ergodic). The Cauchy horizon C^+ is an EML-∞ barrier (SCC).

trapped_surfaces.apparent_horizon: θ = 0 at r = 2M: EML-2 (zero of EML-2 function)
trapped_surfaces.event_horizon: r = 2M globally: EML-∞ (teleological — requires full spacetime knowledge)

eml_depth_apparent_vs_event.distinction: Apparent horizon is locally computable (EML-2); event horizon requires knowing all future (EML-∞)

energy_conditions.name: Null Energy Condition (NEC)
energy_conditions.reason: R_{μν}l^μl^ν: EML-2 (Riemann tensor = EML-2 of metric)

energy_conditions.name: Dominant Energy Condition (DEC)
energy_conditions.statement: T_{μν}v^μ w^ν ≥ 0 for future-directed v^μ, w^ν

penrose_theorem.eml_insight: The singularity time λ* is EML-2 (computable from θ₀); the singularity itself is EML-∞

bkl_oscillations.conjecture: BKL: approach to spacelike singularity = chaotic Kasner oscillations
bkl_oscillations.kasner_solution: ds² = -dt² + Σ t^{2pᵢ} dx_i² with Σpᵢ=1, Σpᵢ²=1
bkl_oscillations.kasner_reason: t^{2p} = exp(2p·ln t): EML-1 (single exp atom)

bkl_chaos.map: u → u-1 if u≥1; u → 1/u if u<1 (Gauss/continued fraction map)
bkl_chaos.reason: Gauss map = EML-∞: ergodic, mixing, generates continued fractions (generically EML-∞)

bkl_oscillations.mixmaster_chaos: Mixmaster universe: Bianchi IX near singularity = BKL chaos = EML-∞. This is the GR analog of the logistic map: simple rule, chaotic orbits.

strong_cosmic_censorship.conjecture: SCC: Generic spacetimes have inextendible maximal Cauchy development
strong_cosmic_censorship.motivation: Physics cannot propagate past a Cauchy horizon — determinism requires SCC

reissner_nordstrom.SCC_status: Violated in exact RN — fields can pass through C^+
reissner_nordstrom.perturbation_blowup: Generic perturbations blow up at C^+
reissner_nordstrom.reason: C^+ is an EML-∞ barrier for generic perturbations

kerr.Dafermos_Luk_2017: C^0 extension exists but curvature blows up
kerr.SCC_status: Borderline — topology changes but C^+ survives in L^2
kerr.reason: Curvature blow-up at C^+ is EML-∞ even if C^+ exists as C^0

strong_cosmic_censorship.eml_insight: The Cauchy horizon C^+ is an EML-∞ barrier in EML terms: the curvature invariants blow up at C^+ for generic data, matching the EML Phase Transition Theorem (singularity = EML-∞).

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Topological charges (linking number, Euler characteristic of horizon)
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Kasner metric t^{2p} = exp(2p·ln t); Hawking temperature T_H ∝ 1/(8πM) = EML-0 × mass
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Trapped surface condition (θ < 0); apparent horizon; Penrose blowup time λ*; RN/Kerr Cauchy horizon radius
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Hawking radiation spectrum (Planckian: involves exp and sin via Bose-Einstein)
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Spacetime singularity; BKL chaos; event horizon (teleological); Cauchy horizon curvature blowup

connections.to_session_77: Session 77: Penrose singularity intro + Kerr. Session 86: full BKL chaos + SCC + trapped surfaces
connections.to_session_57: Phase transitions = EML-∞. Session 86: spacetime singularities = EML-∞ — same universality
